series_metadata.series_description: Final As-Built construction record drawings on Mylar or other media

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Permanent or 1.) capital structure is removed, replaced, or converted, or, 2.) scanned and saved in electronic format. Before disposing paper records notify State Archivist potential review. If State Archivist not want paper records shred. ; Electronic: Permanent unless capital structure is removed, replaced, or converted. Before disposing electronic records notify State Archivist potential review. If State Archivist not want electronic records shred
